name: VanillaOS
tagline: Immutable Debian with a clean GNOME experience
description: VanillaOS is a Debian-based immutable desktop that splits the system into an atomic, unmodifiable base and a flexible user layer managed by its own ABroot tool. Package installation is handled via Apx, a layered container system that lets you install software from any distro's repositories without touching the base image. The result is a clean, stock GNOME experience that never accumulates cruft, supports full rollback after updates, and gradually absorbs best practices from the immutable Linux movement. VanillaOS 2 (Orchid) rebuilt the project entirely from scratch with lessons learned from the first release.
